education_normalized.degree: Bachelor's in Industrial Electronic and Automatic Engineering

work_experience_normalized.description: Electronic, electrical and software engineering support in projects. Management of the requirements and development of new functionalities identified for their integration in the company's offer. Proposal of innovative ideas for the continuous improvement of the organization based on new technologies and trends. Drafting of technical documentation and technical presentations in a clear, concise and coherent manner. Collaboration with co-workers from different departments with different roles and responsibilities.

Organization and updating of both physical and digital documentation. Participation in meetings and visits to clients when necessary. Drafting of technical documentation and preparation of presentations in a clear, concise and coherent manner. Preparation of manuals, reports and comparative reports of products.

international_experience_normalized.description: Focus in robotics, programming and artificial intelligence. Bachelor's thesis about the use of machine learning and lidar for reactive obstacle avoidance in drones.
